expert_opinions.summary: Adapter should wrap the OpenRouter OpenAI-compatible endpoint with provider fallback.
expert_opinions.recommendation: Single OpenRouter key; enable Exacto for tool calls; capture per-generation cost via /api/v1/generation.

expert_opinions.summary: Favor structured outputs and a strict timeout; retries only on 429/5xx.
expert_opinions.recommendation: Add safe_retry with idempotency guard; panel calls are read-only so retry is safe.

consensus_points: Use OpenRouter as the single gateway
Retries safe because panel is read-only

positions.stance: do not depend on caching across provider switches

unique_insights.insight: Pin providers if leaning on caching (breaks across Bedrock/Vertex).

blind_spots: No mention of OpenRouter rate-limit headers

synthesis.artifact: SPEC: Wave 2 provider adapters. Wrap OpenRouter OpenAI-compatible endpoint; single key; Exacto on for tool calls; structured outputs; safe_retry on 429/5xx only; per-generation cost via /api/v1/generation. Do not depend on cross-provider caching.
synthesis.rationale: Merged both experts; kept the caching caveat as an explicit non-dependency.
